case_title: 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC VS. ROBERT HIETT et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED APR-06-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIETT, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY STREET, UNIT NUMBER 45, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HIETT, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIETT, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIETT, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 204-11 LP HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED APR-06-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HIETT, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL
